PTR_STATUS.Settings.Enabled.Name: Enable status replacement
PTR_STATUS.Settings.Enabled.Hint: Replace supported PTR status timing, save checks, and boss-template conversions.
PTR_STATUS.Settings.Chat.Name: Show status chat messages
PTR_STATUS.Settings.Chat.Hint: Post concise private status automation messages to GMs and owners.
PTR_STATUS.Settings.BossCounts.Name: Boss action-gating by initiative count
PTR_STATUS.Settings.BossCounts.Hint: When possible, action-denial conditions affect only the assigned boss combatant count.
PTR_STATUS.Chat.BossPenalty: {actor} suffers -10 to the next damage roll from {label}.
PTR_STATUS.Reason.GhostBleeding: Ghost-Type targets are immune to Bleeding.
PTR_STATUS.Reason.IceFrozen: Ice-Type targets are immune to Frozen/Chilled.
PTR_STATUS.Reason.WeakenedCooldown: Boss Weakened immunity is still active.
PTR_STATUS.Reason.DisableActive: A Boss Template can only have one Disabled move at a time.
